scripts.help:
printf '%s
' 'Available commands:' '  bun run docs:spec' '  bun run docs:rules' '  bun run docs:architecture' '  bun run backend:check' '  bun run backend:fmt' '  bun run backend:clippy' '  bun run backend:test' '  bun run backend:run' '  bun run backend:contract' '  bun run backend:clean' '  bun run repo:tree' '  bun run workspace:status'
scripts.workspace:status:
printf 'root: %s
backend: %s
docs: %s
' "$PWD" "$(test -d backend && echo yes || echo no)" "$(test -d Docs && echo yes || echo no)"
